title: No remote audio recording
author: AFPass
body_snippet:
I have installed mRemote version 1.77.
For an RDP session I tried RDP with protocol version 7 or higher to connect an audio recording device via remote.

Unfortunately the audio recording device is not forwarded to the server.

![grafik](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/13101074/131083958-05209e9b-4e14-4940-b1c7-13aec266d148.png)

iterations.description: The issue indicates that the 'RedirectAudioCapture' functionality for RDP sessions, which redirects audio input from the remote machine, is not working as expected despite being implemented in the code.

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet: Triage refresh (P2): this issue has been inactive for a long time. Please retest on the latest build and share reproducible steps, expected vs actual behavior, and logs/screenshots. If there is no confirmation/update, maintainers can close it as stale or not reproducible.

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:

_Automated by mRemoteNG Issue Intelligence System_

notes:
AI triage (gemini): The issue indicates that the 'RedirectAudioCapture' functionality for RDP sessions, which redirects audio input from the remote machine, is not working as expected despite being implemented in the code.
Approach: Investigate `RdpProtocol7.cs` to verify that `rdpClient.AdvancedSettings8.AudioCaptureRedirectionMode` is being correctly applied and that the underlying RDP control supports and correctly handles this setting, or identify if an issue exists in related connection property handling.
